text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Mejiro Bright has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting all this time, Trainer. I
know I took quite a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But the preparations are finally complete. It's now
time for our hot spring vacation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With those words, I recall us winning the hot
spring ticket back at the raffle. But what really
has my attention is something different.
choice_data_list: What preparations did you have to make?
What preparations did you have to make?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I had to find cute towels and have new clothes
made for my dolls Maki and Kyu.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Also, there was an even more time-consuming
task.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I had to secure enough victories so that I, as an
Umamusume of the Mejiro family, could finally
relax without shame.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As laid-back as Mejiro Bright can be, it seems she
took her win record into account before
scheduling this trip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Haaaah... ♪ Traaainer... The waaater was sooo
peeerfect...
choice_data_list: Whoa! You're really stretching out your words!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, dear. I'm sorry. A long bath makes even my
speaking loose and at ease.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hot springs are quite remarkable. Not only does
my body feel relaxed, but my heart as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, this has been a comforting
dream of mine for quite a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, being the owner of a hot
spring inn used to be my future ambition.
choice_data_list: You wanted to run a hot spring inn?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's unexpected... I struggle to wrap my mind
around the idea of a Mejiro becoming the
proprietor of a hot spring inn.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's true, Trainer. And now is actually the perfect
opportunity for me to play the part.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That makes you my guest, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Bright fully assumes the air of
an inn owner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the House of Brilliance. Please, come
inside.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
First, through this window, you can enjoy our
delightful garden. Oh my, would you look at that
flower?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It looks like it's about to bloom, though that
doesn't happen in an instant. However, if you stay
and watch patiently, eventually you'll see its full
transformation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I would give it two to maybe three days.
choice_data_list: I don't think I want to sit here that long...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right. You'll be all packed up and gone
by then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: In that case, let me show you the baths.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This is the pride of our establishment, the
Sole-Restoring Waters. Go ahead, step in...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Please, give your legs a good rest. May the water
return their strength if even only just a second
faster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's something a bit unconventional about this
tour. Wait a second...
choice_data_list: Is your fantasy an Umamusume hot spring?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It is. There are many Umamusume who suffer an
injury and must rest for quite some time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I know how difficult it is for them, being unable to
run as they wish. Over time, their insecurities pile
up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But if they could relax in the waters of a hot
spring... I think it would not only heal their
wounds, it would help light a spark back into their
hearts as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Surely... that is also the duty of a Mejiro, is it not?
To support all Umamusume in the long term.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So, her dream of being the owner of a hot spring
inn isn't just an idle fantasy, it emerged as part of
her responsibilities as a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The light from Mejiro Bright... will reach far into
the future of the Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, how was I? Do I make a good
proprietress?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Hearing you say that is quite the boost to
my confidence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to start our inn together when the time
comes. Trainer, you can handle the business side!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She naturally assumes I'm on board, but I can't
say I mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! Teehee, I knew I could
count on you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Why wouldn't I want to help with such a
wonderful idea? I think we can accomplish this
splendid dream of hers together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Mejiro Bright and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
